title: AIIMS Madurai Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Project Technical Support II Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Madurai (AIIMS Madurai) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of various Project Technical Support II Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the 12th or Diploma can grab this chance and apply for the AIIMS Madurai Notification 2026 . Here, we provided more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
